textByHash.0d3a29688bf201a988d281be3bc97eda91ba5f78: If I told you it would spoil the surprise!
textByHash.0de420c8ab1685289c0c59d6bde42fd2d1911ac9: My friend, it would be an honour. My sword is yours.
textByHash.10725396bb5639f1f7163f893539d2a66bb47599: Well you see my dear lady, the games there really do sap your energy quite a bit. You can find it just up the stairs behind the bank.
textByHash.1ae9eb17cf4b881108c51f25b9401f4d5a7af786: may find yourself panting for breath though.
textByHash.1f51bd57a67c20a2f1976614c61b493055232e90: No need to be afraid, it's all under very controlled conditions! You can find it just up the stairs behind the bank.
textByHash.266cee8bce9cfdbd61649ff0a19f4ee02583f1a6: Oh my no! I think Gamfred would object to that most strongly.
textByHash.2cac7fcd4f173029490044f4ba185d0895105c4f: amount of tokens you collect from the various activities around the guild will dictate how long Kamfreena will allow you in the enclosure on the very top floor. More tokens equals more time.
textByHash.31f596376f017648188486ee7e999b5836262914: Ahh yes, our resident magician from foreign lands created a most amazing gadget which can turn your own armour against you! It's really quite intriguing.
textByHash.366b1131feb41b9c5d9448739cfd9078496f6ee4: He's an inventor you see and has built a marvellous contraption that can throw all sorts of things at you including magic missiles...
textByHash.371080976380925b4bbfbe31915a28c2547845ae: Not that they really needed us. He was no Zemouregal, and his attack didn't really amount to much.
textByHash.3854df72c018c5b6dcf1bd009f81b247f9e1e486: You can find it just down the corridor and on your right.
textByHash.416f9bf042140fef9ffab49fd8de24ce5909a581: Indeed we do. Would you like to know more about it?
textByHash.4c0f2c3ded36926cd737101690d6f0e4210fe80a: Absolutely, but I positively relish them as well. There's nothing like a bit of danger to get the blood pumping.
textByHash.4da1e797c1fd069447401e5d13c8ade82e781bcd: My dear sir, I couldn't possibly duel you, I might hurt you and then what would happen to my reputation! Besides, I have this wonderful guild to run. Why don't you take a look at the various activities we
textByHash.4eb967bac3de194cae501f65eb0a966942688766: Well you see my dear boy, the games there really do sap your energy quite a bit. You can find it just up the stairs behind the bank.
textByHash.5da55ac824348b5c6e8ef52f55ed2a982d6310e8: Getting back to Falador would be wiser. Did you see the way he slaughtered us? That our weapons are useless? How many more would die? Some must survive to report this nightmare!
textByHash.5df5653d6270be83aa326eaac17f77f231959328: Of course. What would you like to know about?
textByHash.5f59e831366c41bebfa45b5e36d401bc022baebf: Oh no my dear lady, I did not mean you at all! The training area has mechanical dummies which pop up out of holes in the floor. The noble dwarf Gamfred invented the mechanism and Ajjat can explain more about what
textByHash.61b083e5ef002fbbb99c75047eff77f351860e30: Ahh, yes, our token system is designed to allow you an appropriate amount of time with my discovery in the very top floor of the guild. I won't spoil the surprise as to what that is. Go up and see for yourself. Now, the
textByHash.6490a119f499460437db486b3044e1a532e6494b: have. You might even collect enough tokens to be allowed in to kill the strange beasts from the east!
textByHash.69e605959b80a53ce03f42276b4ac82593038c6f: Why I could best any person alive in a rapier duel!
textByHash.728e501d4ff1fef9819223867c5670c0f6232a7a: Oh yes. Many years ago, I was one of a group of heroes recruited by the Temple Knights to help stop his attack on Varrock.
textByHash.76a8478d3577726160bebf9c1c6e7844fde6ff97: Indeed we have had a few fatalities from warriors over stretching themselves and not knowing their limits. Start small and work up is my motto! That and go see Lidio for some food if you need it.
textByHash.76aa05936a7471db5cb58562b847c592a2453248: Ah, now that is a topic we could debate for many moons, my friend. Still, regardless of the reason, know that when the time comes, I will fight beside you against Lucien once more.
textByHash.813e74d993b5ae272d2f3ebbeb21a792f50ad9f9: Ah, it's good to get going on a real adventure again. The Guild takes up so much of my time these days.
textByHash.879cab8c90ea6f32e6997da42a00f1fae15cbdba: You can earn them simply by using the training exercises around the guild, the staff will then enter this into a ledger as you play. You can claim them by simply asking any of the staff at the training areas, or
textByHash.8c5f981708be9d21507629f6c5c4ecd84a886281: I see... That is disturbing news, my friend. I take it you seek my help in fighting against him once more?
textByHash.975c68176c398915c7578c83f93cf9c5a30eee76: My dear lady, I couldn't possibly duel you, I might hurt you and then what would happen to my reputation! Besides, I have this wonderful guild to run. Why don't you take a look at the various activities we
textByHash.99a09bd1360735347562c732122f01311b1e0dce: Farewell fair lady, I do hope you enjoy my guild.
textByHash.9bcf8f8c7be1690ee729dc9a8472e47c87c86162: Farewell brave warrior, I do hope you enjoy my guild.
textByHash.9f1e5978edbef3b0585ef904aaeb5f732aeac6f2: the armour, the harder it is to 'kill'.
textByHash.9fa5947bca71acdfa13d63e45eac490d64c9570d: Don't worry, friend. I will be joining you at the White Knights' Castle shortly.
textByHash.a3140c218d88c787236856a4c474f8d03553d0b0: Remember them for who they were and what they stood for. Mourn their loss, but never bear the burden of their death, for that is not what they would want.
textByHash.ae5baaa65651cc9699712ccb325089f24a21cdd0: Nonsense, my friend! They both died bravely fighting against a great evil! There is no blame on you for that.
textByHash.af7f1546428be35c8dff4dbc6d16d037f7fe2bb5: Ahh the mighty warrior Sloane guards the strength training area. This intriguing little area consists of two shotput lanes for different weights of shot. It's fairly simple, the Referee or Sloane can explain more. You
textByHash.bc36ea3da3205c7787e10894125be57ac8bd03aa: Am I any good with....a sword... Have you any clue who I am?
textByHash.bdc574697521d02be798466b559b2e16fd33e537: I've lost two of my dear friends. This old place doesn't seem to be the same since they're gone.
textByHash.cdea2a7482ecfdf0055fdfde9d8ff1136685032d: Lucien? You speak of the Mahjarrat?
textByHash.d83f214c5364481212d53d07c41255f510749995: To polish your defensive skills to the very highest level we've employed a most inventive dwarf and a catapult.
textByHash.e64da66406e2f7ff170a685b5d1eb392c2fdafb2: So far that's not happened. You need to speak to Shanomi about the specifics of the process, but as I understand it, putting a suit of armour in one of these devices will make it come to life some how. The better
textByHash.e65c5c867597cc4a272f48fd1571cb71986ddce5: Oh no my dear man, I did not mean you at all! The training area has mechanical dummies which pop up out of holes in the floor. The noble dwarf Gamfred invented the mechanism and Ajjat can explain more about what
textByHash.f6d4504f4b99178708a7642987a1b360034f9add: , get back to Falador! We're teleporting out now!
textByHash.ffd991f3a56280524c48676b72dd9e8dd4321b51: I will join you there as soon as I'm able.
